response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile engineer with clear strengths in the technical productivity domain this role targets: developer tooling (MCP code generators, CI/CD setup, GitLab administration), and especially testing infrastructure (built the Trial test runner and Fluent-Asserts library, taught Selenium/TDD courses). Tenure easily exceeds the 8-year development minimum, and a BS in CS satisfies the education bar. However, this is fundamentally a people-leadership role requiring 2+ years of people management, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, running one-on-ones, owning performance, or leading a team — 'Staff' and 'Founder' titles imply seniority but not line management. Mobile-platform depth (a preferred area) is also thin beyond legacy iOS/Apple TV work. Worth a screening conversation to probe for unstated leadership experience, but the core management requirement is currently unmet.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and testing-infrastructure background (test runner, assertion library, CI/CD, code katas)
Extensive multi-stack engineering tenure well above the 8-year minimum
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or direct-report leadership experience (core requirement)
Limited mobile-platform depth beyond older iOS/Apple TV work
Roadmap/strategic-planning and org-change leadership not evidenced
